name: Suitefish CMS

name: Bugfish Framework
description: A web framework prioritizing security, flexibility, and performance, streamlining development and scalability.

name: Online Book Renting
description: Manage books on a public page and let users rent or donate them, with a powerful admin user management system.

name: Mail Relaying over DNS
description: Sets up a backup MX server that stores incoming emails if the primary server is offline and forwards them when it's back.
